svg.title: Fahh Editor architecture diagram
svg.desc: Layered architecture of the Fahh Editor showing frontend, core, AI layer, optional tools, and installer

g.text: Monaco Editor · infinite canvas · panel docking · file tree · terminal (xterm.js)
LSP client · file watcher · error detector · git (gitoxide) · session state
IPC bridge to frontend via Tauri commands
AI coding agent layer — TypeScript (sidecar process)
Claude CLI · GitHub Copilot · inline completions · chat panel · code actions
Model Context Protocol (MCP) as the standard tool interface
Optional tools — user selects at install time
Cross-platform installer — Tauri updater + custom setup wizard
Windows · macOS · Linux · checks deps · opt-in tool install
Reference architecture: github.com/0-AI-UG/cate — replicate panel/canvas patterns, adapt to Tauri
